_comment: M&M 3e power modifiers (extras and flaws) — from the d20 Hero SRD (OGL)

accurate.name: Accurate
accurate.note: +2 attack check bonus per rank of this modifier

affects_corporeal.name: Affects Corporeal
affects_corporeal.note: Incorporeal user's effect works on corporeal targets

affects_insubstantial.name: Affects Insubstantial
affects_insubstantial.note: 1 rank: half effectiveness on insubstantial. 2 ranks: full effectiveness

affects_objects.name: Affects Objects
affects_objects.note: +0/rank if objects only, +1/rank if objects and subjects. Fortitude-resisted effects work on objects

affects_others.name: Affects Others
affects_others.note: +0/rank if others only, +1/rank if self and others. Personal effect usable via touch

alternate_effect.name: Alternate Effect
alternate_effect.note: Substitute one effect for another in a power array. 2 points for Dynamic AE

alternate_resistance.name: Alternate Resistance
alternate_resistance.note: +0/rank for equally common resistance, +1/rank for less common resistance

area.name: Area
area.note: +1/rank. Effect works on area. Targets make Dodge check DC 10+rank to halve effect. Each +1/rank adds another area rank.

attack.name: Attack
attack.note: Personal effect works offensively on others

contagious.name: Contagious
contagious.note: Effect spreads to anyone contacting affected target

dimensional.name: Dimensional
dimensional.note: 1: one other dimension, 2: any of two, 3: any dimension

homing.name: Homing
homing.note: Missed attack retries on following round. +1 retry per rank

impervious.name: Impervious
impervious.note: Resistance ignores effects with difficulty modifier equal to or less than half resistance rank

increased_mass.name: Increased Mass
increased_mass.note: Effect carries more mass per rank

incurable.name: Incurable
incurable.note: Effect cannot be removed by Healing or Regeneration

indirect.name: Indirect
indirect.note: 1: fixed origin away from you. 2: any point away from you. 3: fixed origin+direction. 4: any origin+direction

innate.name: Innate
innate.note: Cannot be Nullified. For inborn natural traits only

insidious.name: Insidious
insidious.note: Result of effect is harder to detect (DC 20+ Perception/skill to notice)

linked.name: Linked
linked.note: Two or more effects work together as one. Must have same range

multiattack.name: Multiattack
multiattack.note: Hit multiple targets or gain +2/+5 DC vs single target depending on degree of success on attack

penetrating.name: Penetrating
penetrating.note: Overcomes Impervious Resistance, rank for rank

precise.name: Precise
precise.note: Effect can perform delicate and precise tasks

reaction.name: Reaction
reaction.note: Effect triggers automatically. +1: specific rare trigger, +2: common trigger, +3: any trigger

reversible.name: Reversible
reversible.note: Remove effect as free action at will

ricochet.name: Ricochet
ricochet.note: Bounce attack to change direction (ignore cover)

secondary_effect.name: Secondary Effect
secondary_effect.note: Instant effect applies again on the following round automatically

selective.name: Selective
selective.note: Choose which targets in area/effect are affected

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.note: Targets left asleep rather than incapacitated (cosmetic change)

split.name: Split
split.note: Split effect into multiple smaller effects

subtle.name: Subtle
subtle.note: 1 rank: DC 20 Perception to notice. 2 ranks: completely undetectable

sustained.name: Sustained (modifier)
sustained.note: Makes permanent effect sustained (can be turned on/off but requires free action)

triggered.name: Triggered
triggered.note: Set effect for later activation by circumstance. +1 trigger stored per rank

variable_descriptor.name: Variable Descriptor
variable_descriptor.note: 1: narrow group of descriptors. 2: broad group of descriptors

activation.name: Activation
activation.note: -1: move action to activate. -2: standard action to activate

check_required.name: Check Required
check_required.note: Must succeed on check to use effect. DC 10 + rank of Check Required

diminished_range.name: Diminished Range
diminished_range.note: Reduce ranged distances. Each rank reduces range by a factor

fades.name: Fades
fades.note: Loses 1 rank each time it is used

feedback.name: Feedback
feedback.note: Suffer damage when physical manifestation is damaged

increased_action.name: Increased Action
increased_action.note: Increases action required. -1: free to move, -2: move to standard, -3: standard to full round

limited.name: Limited
limited.note: Effect loses about half its effectiveness or applies only in specific circumstances

noticeable.name: Noticeable
noticeable.note: Continuous or permanent effect is readily noticeable

permanent.name: Permanent (flaw)
permanent.note: Effect cannot be turned off, suppressed, or improved with extra effort

quirk.name: Quirk
quirk.note: Minor nuisance or drawback to effect

reduced_range.name: Reduced Range
reduced_range.note: -1/rank reduces range one step: perception->ranged->close. -2/rank: two steps

removable.name: Removable
removable.note: -1 per 5 points: removable with effort. -2 per 5 points: easily removable. For devices/objects.

resistible.name: Resistible
resistible.note: Effect gains a resistance check (for effects that normally have none)

sense_dependent.name: Sense-Dependent
sense_dependent.note: Target must perceive effect through specific sense for it to work

side_effect.name: Side Effect
side_effect.note: -1: side effect on failure only. -2: side effect always occurs

tiring.name: Tiring
tiring.note: Using effect causes one level of fatigue

uncontrolled.name: Uncontrolled
uncontrolled.note: GM decides when and how effect works

unreliable.name: Unreliable
unreliable.note: Effect only works about half the time (roll 11+ on d20, or 5 uses per scene)

note: Minimum adjusted cost is 1 per rank. Flat modifiers apply after rank multiplication.
